description: PRD-002 — Módulo de metas completo: CRUD genérico, checkins de progresso, progresso percentual

userStories.title: Criar migration para tabela goal_checkins
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a table to store goal progress checkins.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration for goal_checkins table with: id (uuid PK), user_goal_id (foreign uuid to user_goals), value (decimal 10,2), notes (text nullable), recorded_at (date), created_at, updated_at
Add cascadeOnDelete on user_goal_id foreign key
Migration runs successfully with php artisan migrate
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Follow existing migration patterns: UUID primary keys, foreignUuid for FKs.

userStories.title: Criar model GoalCheckin e atualizar UserGoal
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Eloquent models for goal checkins.
acceptanceCriteria: Create GoalCheckin model with UUID support, fillable fields, belongsTo UserGoal relationship
Add hasMany GoalCheckin relationship to UserGoal model
Add progress_percentage accessor to UserGoal: (current_value / target_value) * 100
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Check existing UserGoal model for current fields before modifying.

userStories.title: Refatorar GoalController com CRUD completo
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create, list, view, edit, and archive custom fitness goals.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /v1/goals — list all user goals with optional status filter (?status=active|completed|archived)
POST /v1/goals — create goal with: title, type, target_value, deadline, unit, visibility
GET /v1/goals/{id} — show goal detail with progress_percentage
PUT /v1/goals/{id} — edit title, target_value, deadline, visibility
PUT /v1/goals/{id}/archive — set status to archived
Add routes in api.php under v1 prefix with auth middleware
Return proper HTTP status codes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Keep existing updateExercise and updateAlimentation methods.

userStories.title: Implementar checkins de progresso
userStories.description: As a user, I want to log progress checkins on my goals.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /v1/goals/{id}/checkins — create checkin with: value, notes (optional), date (optional)
After creating checkin, update UserGoal current_value
If progress_percentage >= 100, mark goal as completed
GET /v1/goals/{id}/checkins — list checkins with pagination
Add routes in api.php
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Integrar metas com gamificação
userStories.description: As a user, I want to earn XP when I complete goals.
acceptanceCriteria: When goal status changes to completed, grant 100 XP via GamificationService
Add checkGoalBadges method to GamificationService
XP transaction type: goal_completed
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Endpoint de progresso com dados para gráfico
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my goal progress history as chart data.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /v1/goals/{id}/progress — returns goal info + checkin history sorted by date
Response includes: goal (title, target_value, unit), current_value, progress_percentage, checkins array
Add route in api.php
Typecheck passes
